## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation

## How to test

<!-- Steps to verify the behavior locally. -->

```bash
shards install
crystal spec
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The code compiles (`crystal build`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`crystal tool format --check`)
- [ ] The linter passes (`ameba`)
- [ ] The specs pass (`crystal spec`)
- [ ] I have added / updated tests where needed
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README) where needed
